text: As I enter this vibrant, technology-driven space, a sense of curiosity awakens. The glass walls and neon glow evoke the feeling of crossing into a realm where ideas and innovation collide. I am struck by the bold R+D on the wall—Research and Development—a promise of progress. There is something inviting, almost sacred, about the atmosphere. Here, possibility and contemplation sit side by side. I feel eager to explore, slightly disoriented but enthralled by the invitation to reflect and engage with the evolving synergy of humans and machines.
